# WPT skip-list — files that crash the test host UNCATCHABLY (e.g. a native
# stack overflow in the JS parser / layout / event dispatch that .NET cannot
# trap), which would otherwise abort the whole run. One path substring per line;
# '#' starts a comment. These are triage backlog, not permanent exclusions —
# remove the entry once the underlying engine crash is fixed.
#
# Committed (this file lives under testdata/wpt/, which is tracked; only
# testdata/wpt/suite/ and testdata/wpt/results/ are gitignored).

# StackOverflow-class crash during load (deep async/recursion). Found 2026-05-24.
dom/events/pointer-event-document-move.html
dom/nodes/DocumentFragment-getElementById.html
dom/nodes/svg-template-querySelector.html
